intentSynonyms: show me my resource groups in azure
view my resource groups in azure
see all my resource groups in azure
list resource groups in a subscription in azure
description: List all resource groups in an Azure subscription. Returns name, location, provisioning state, and tags.

filter.description: OData filter expression (e.g., "tagName eq 'env' and tagValue eq 'prod'")

top.description: Maximum number of results to return
